title: Recursion, Recurrences, and Divide-and-Conquer · Execution Trace: Recursion Iteration Choice
summary: Break a large document and spatial search problem into independently checkable subproblems. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose recursion, explicit stack, or iteration from depth, clarity, and resource constraints.
Design balanced subproblems and prove the combine step preserves correctness.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
